title: athyrium naganumanum
intro: Athyrium naganumanum, also known as Japanese lady fern, is a species of fern native to Japan. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Athyrium naganumanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, as well as its potential to alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, Athyrium naganumanum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
